data.content: Plan review approved. The proposed implementation targets the confirmed stale-data source in repo-scoped React Query hooks that currently use keepPreviousData, covers the beats list plus sibling final-cut and retakes views, and includes the beat-detail stale-content risk. Test strategy is sufficient if it validates repo-switch clearing/loading behavior while preserving same-repo background refetch UX, and browser verification should confirm the loader appears within 1 second with no old-repo content flash.
